message:
Running command: # The flow.log shows OpenROAD is loading (STA lib warnings) for step 32 GlobalRouting
# but then stops. The [GRT-0097] and STA-0441 are just OpenROAD startup messages.
# After loading, OpenROAD should start GRT. Let's wait for actual GRT progress.
sleep 600
tail -5 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/flow.log 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/ 2>/dev/null
